message:
🐛 Fix sidebar navigation — force full page reload

React Router v7's startTransition-based navigation is blocked by
recharts' useSyncExternalStore infinite loops. Sidebar NavLink clicks
change the URL but the Outlet never re-renders. Workaround: use
window.location.href for sidebar navigation until the recharts/React 19
compatibility issue is resolved.

Also wraps Outlet in Suspense with location key for route transitions.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -500,7 +500,9 @@ export function Layout({ children }: LayoutProps) { className="relative flex-1 p-4 pb-24 md:p-6 md:pb-28 transition-[margin] duration-300 overflow-y-auto scroll-enhanced min-w-0" > - + + +
